ops.title: 0.10→0.11 upgrade wedge: new daemon cannot evict old-wire incumbent
ops.description: The daemonkit control-socket migration (cc-interact v0.12.0) changed wire framing. A 0.11.0 daemon health-checking a ≤0.10.x incumbent reads JSON bytes as a length prefix ('wire: frame exceeds maximum: 2065854578') and fails 'acquire listener' instead of treating the incumbent as evictable — so post-upgrade, start reports 'child did not come up within 30s' until the old daemon is stopped manually (old binary 'stop', or kill the pid). Hit live on yBook-Pro 2026-07-19; every 0.10.x machine upgrading will hit it once. Candidate fix: treat an incompatible-wire handshake as an evictable incumbent (kill by socket-lock pid) in cc-interact's acquire path.
